question: ETT for spare shots?
content:
Spares require precision, not power.
And precision comes from alignment, not muscle.
When you shoot a spare:
You want the swing to stay straight
You want no side motion
You want the release clean
You want your eyes, body, and ball on ONE straight line
E.T.T makes your spare game automatic.
If your body or swing points slightly away from the spare, the ball will follow the misalignment and miss, even if the release was good.
That’s why pros are deadly accurate on spares:
they don’t aim harder, they align better.
